# Seedream Pricing Guide | ImagineArt

Find everything about Seedream pricing, including Seedream 4 pricing and Seedream 4.5 credit costs per image. See credit breakdowns, usage examples, and output calculations.

[Try Seedream](https://www.imagine.art/image)

Arooj Ishtiaq

Arooj Ishtiaq

Tue Feb 24 2026 • Updated Wed Mar 25 2026

4 mins Read

ON THIS PAGE

Seedream Pricing — A Quick Rundown How Seedream Pricing Works on ImagineArt? Seedream v4 Pricing and Features Seedream v4.
5 Pricing and Quality Upgrade Estimate Your Image Output with Seedream Official Seedream Platform Pricing Seedream 5.0 Pricing Which Seedream Model Should You Use? Start Creating with Seedream on ImagineArt

 [](https://twitter.com/Imagine_aiart) [](https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/imagine-ai-art-generator) [](https://www.instagram.com/imagineartofficial) Copy link

ByteDance’s Seedream models are a quick choice for fast, high-fidelity AI image generation. For creators, marketers, and businesses, Seedream does advertisements, realistic images, concept art, social content, and publishing-ready business assets. But if you are a smart, creative person, you definitely know how to balance visual output against Seedream pricing.

This blog covers:

* Seedream costs on the native ByteDance platform
* Seedream credit consumption for images on [ImagineArt AI creative suite]

## Seedream Pricing — A Quick Rundown

...

5: 41 images (984 credits)

### With 5,000 Credits

* Seedream v4: 277 images (4,986 credits)
* Seedream v4.5: 208 images (4,992 credits)

### Mixed Workflow Example

* 150 v4 images (2,700 credits)
* 95 v4.5 images (2,280 credits)
* Total output: 245 images

This mixed approach keeps production efficient. You generate concepts in v4, then finalize selected outputs in v4.5 for higher refinement.

## Official Seedream Platform Pricing

Seedream Pricing on Platforms Seedream Pricing on Platforms

Pricing varies across platforms rather than coming from a single centralized provider.

Typical per-image rates:

* **Seedream v4:** $0.025–$0.069 per image. Replicate averages around $0.027, while packs average around $0.05 per credit.
* **Seedream v4.5:** $0.035–$0.045 per image, with trial programs often offering 100–200 images.

Here is a simplified overview:

Seedream credits consumption of models.png Seedream credits consumption of models.png
Official platforms typically provide API flexibility and sometimes larger trial allocations. However, pricing structures can vary depending on usage tiers and host providers.

## Seedream 5.0 Pricing

[Seedream 5.0 Lite](https://www.imagine.art/features/seedream-5-0) consumes 20 credits per image generation on the ImagineArt platform, providing users with flexible access to high-quality image generation for creative projects.
On BytePlus, the same model is available through tiered plans, with 400 images for $6.99, 1028 images for $24.99, and 2000 images for $49.99, each valid for 30 days from the first purchase.

[Create Images With Seedream v5](https://www.imagine.art/image)

## Which Seedream Model Should You Use?

Your choice depends on workload and project requirements.

* Use **Seedream v4 at 18 credits** when you need high-volume generation, rapid concept testing, or draft visuals.
* Use **Seedream v4.
5 at 24 credits** when you need refined outputs suitable for final delivery or professional campaigns.
* A strategic workflow combines both. Generate in v4 for speed, then refine selected visuals in v4.5. This approach balances cost control and output quality.

## Start Creating with Seedream on ImagineArt

Seedream pricing is clear and predictable, with no expiry on credits. v4 works well for high-volume images, and v4.5 gives extra refinement for polished results.

Using both models lets you move from drafts to final images efficiently. With flexible, scalable pricing, Seedream makes it easy to create, experiment, and produce high-quality visuals.

[Create Images With Seedream v5](https://www.imagine.art/image)

Arooj Ishtiaq

### Arooj Ishtiaq

Arooj is a SaaS content writer specializing in AI models and applied technology. At ImagineArt, she creates sharp, product-focused content that helps creators and businesses understand, adopt, and get real value from AI tools.

excerpts: > ## Documentation Index > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://docs.laozhang.ai/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. # SeeDream Image Generation/Editing > SeeDream API: BytePlus Ark image model. Supports 4.0 ($0.035/image) and 4.5 ($0.045/image) versions, text-to-image and image-to-image, up to 10 reference images. **API Endpoint:** `https://api.laozhang.ai/v1/images/generations` **Available Models:** * `seedream-4-0-250828` - \$0.035/image * `seedream-4-5-251128` - \$0.045/image (Latest version) **Billing:** Pay-per-use **Pricing Update Notice (January 2026)** Official subsidy has ended, SeeDream prices have been adjusted: * SeeDream 4.0: $0.025/image → **$0.035/image\*\* * SeeDream 4.5 (New version): **\$0.045/image** ## Prerequisites Log in to [laozhang.ai console](https://api.laozhang.ai) to obtain your API key Edit token settings and choose one of the following billing modes (same price for both): * **Volume Priority** (Recommended): Uses balance billing first, automatically switches when balance is insufficient. Suitable for most users * **Pay-per-call**: Direct deduction for each call. Suitable for strict budget control scenarios Both modes have **exactly the same price**, only the billing method differs. SeeDream 4.0 is \$0.035/image, 4.5 is \$0.045/image. If billing mode is not configured, API calls will fail. You must complete this configuration first! ## Changelog **September 11, 2025** - SeeDream 4.0 API launched officially, integrated by LaoZhang AI on the same day ## Core Features Generate high-quality images from text descriptions AI editing and redrawing based on source images Supports up to 10 reference images Customizable image resolution and size Fully compatible with OpenAI Image API format 4.0 at $0.035/image, 4.5 at $0.045/image ## Key Information ### Source **Strategic Partnership** SeeDream 4.0 is powered by **BytePlus Ark** (international version). ... 0** | `seedream-4-0-250828` | \$0.035/image | Stable version | | **SeeDream 4.5** | `seedream-4-5-251128` | \$0.045/image | Latest version, higher quality | 💰 **Pricing Details** * **SeeDream 4.0**: \$0.035/image * **SeeDream 4.5**: \$0.045/image * **Billing note**: Pay-per-use pricing, with actual charges visible in call logs ## Getting Started Login to [LaoZhang API Token Management](https://api.laozhang.ai/token) and create a **pay-per-use** token **Important**: Must select "Pay-per-use" type ... echo "" echo "🎉 Complete! Check the edited image file" echo "💡 Tip: Modify PROMPT and IMAGE_URL to edit different images" else echo "❌ Image download failed" echo "🔗 You can manually access: $EDITED_IMAGE_URL" fi ``` ## Resources ### Official Documentation BytePlus ModelArk official technical documentation Seedream 4.0 User Manual Seedream 4.0 User Guide Prompting and style keyword guide

Seedream Pricing Guide 2026: Compare 4.0, 4.5, and 5.0 Lite Costs

guide

# Seedream Pricing Guide 2026: Compare 4.0, 4.5, and 5.0 Lite Costs

EvoLink Team

EvoLink Team

Product Team

April 13, 2026

9 min read

If you are evaluating **Seedream API pricing** , the most useful question is not "how much does it cost?" but **"which version fits my budget and workflow?"** — because the three Seedream versions serve different production needs at different price points.

This guide compares Seedream 4.0, 4.5, and 5.0 Lite pricing on EvoLink as of April 2026, including per-image costs, how pricing compares to official BytePlus rates, and when each version makes financial sense.

## TL;DR

* **Seedream 4.0** : $0.018/image on EvoLink (40% less than official $0.
03) — cheapest option for high-volume text-to-image generation
* **Seedream 4.5** : $0.03/image on EvoLink (25% less than official $0.04) — best for 4K editing and multi-image workflows
* **Seedream 5.0 Lite** : $0.031/image on EvoLink (11% less than official $0.035) — premium option with deep thinking and web search
* All versions: pay-as-you-go, no minimums, free credits for new accounts

* * *

## Seedream pricing comparison table

| |Seedream 4.0 |Seedream 4.5 |Seedream 5.0 Lite |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|**EvoLink price** |$0.018/image |$0.03/image |$0.031/image |
|**Official BytePlus price** |$0.03/image |$0.04/image |$0.035/image |
|**EvoLink savings** |40% |25% |11% |
|**EvoLink credits** |1\.8 credits |2\.16 credits |2\.2 credits |
|**Billing unit** |Per image |Per image |Per image |
|**Batch multiplier** |Yes (price x n) |Yes (price x n) |Yes (price x n) |
|**Web Search add-on** |N/A |N/A |$0.0069/request |
_Last verified: April 13, 2026 against EvoLink catalog and data/models.ts_

* * *

## When each version makes financial sense

### Seedream 4.0 — Best for high-volume generation at lowest cost

At **$0.018 per image** , Seedream 4.0 is the cheapest image generation API in the Seedream family. Choose this when:

* You are running **batch text-to-image generation** at scale (campaigns, product variants, social content)
* Your workflow is generation-first, not editing-first
* You need **multi-reference consistency** but don't need 4K editing or deep thinking
* Budget matters more than having the latest features

**Example** : Generating 1,000 images costs **$18 on EvoLink** vs $30 on official BytePlus — a $12 saving per batch.

Try Seedream 4.0 on EvoLink

### Seedream 4.5 — Best for editing-heavy production workflows

At **$0.03 per image** , Seedream 4.5 costs 67% more than 4.0 but adds 4K editing, better text rendering, and stronger multi-image consistency. Choose this when:

...

### High-volume production — agency or marketplace

* ~50,000 images/month
* **Seedream 4.0** : 50,000 x $0.018 = **$900/month**
* Same volume on BytePlus official: 50,000 x $0.03 = $1,500/month — **you save $600/month**

* * *

## Understanding batch pricing with the `n` parameter

The `n` parameter lets you generate multiple images in one API call (up to 15). Cost scales linearly:

|`n` value |Seedream 4.0 cost |Seedream 4.5 cost |Seedream 5.0 Lite cost |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|1 |$0.018 |$0.03 |$0.031 |
|3 |$0.054 |$0.09 |$0.093 |
|5 |$0.09 |$0.15 |$0.155 |
|10 |$0.18 |$0.30 |$0.31 |
|15 |$0.27 |$0.45 |$0.465 |

When to batch:

* **Use `n=3-5` during exploration** — try a few variations to find the right direction
* **Use `n=1` for production** — once your prompt is dialed in, generate one at a time
* **Never use `n=15` blindly** — that's 15x the cost; only do this if you genuinely need 15 unique variants

### Web search cost breakdown (5.0 Lite only)

results.title: Pricing overview--BytePlus Video on Demand-Byteplus
excerpts:
BytePlus Video on Demand

Document AI MediaKit

* Home
BytePlus Video on Demand Pricing Pricing overview

Copy Page

Pricing

Pricing overview

Copy Page

Pricing overview

BytePlus VOD operates on a flexible pay-as-you-go pricing model, ensuring you only pay for the resources you consume. This document provides a comprehensive overview of the cost structure, covering the main billable items such as media storage, processing, video editing, and distribution acceleration, as well as the available payment methods and billing cycles.

## Billing structure

Image

## Payment method

BytePlus VOD offers pay-as-you-go pricing, which allows you to easily adapt to changing business needs.

## Billing cycles

BytePlus VOD supports two billing cycles:

* Daily billing cycle: Fees generated daily are deducted the following day, and a corresponding bill is issued.
* Monthly billing cycle: Fees generated each calendar month are deducted the following month, and a corresponding bill is issued.

...

* Video enhancement: Fees are calculated based on total output duration.
* Image processing: Fees are calculated based on the total size of the original images processed.
* Smart subtitling: Fees are calculated based on the total speech-to-text duration and the character count for machine translation. |* Daily pay-as-you-go
* Monthly pay-as-you-go |
|Distribution acceleration |Distribution acceleration fees are calculated using one of the following methods:

* Charging based on the daily peak bandwidth.
* Charging based on traffic with a tiered pricing structure. |* Daily pay-as-you-go
* Monthly pay-as-you-go |
|Player SDK license |BytePlus VOD offers two versions of the player SDK: standard and premium. To use the player SDK, you must purchase a license. |* Per license |

## Billing regions

You are charged based on the location of the edge server that serves your content. The following table lists the countries and regions that correspond to each billing region:
|**Billing region** |**Edge location** |
| --- | --- |
|Asia Pacific 1 |* Singapore
* Japan
* Thailand
* Malaysia
* Hong Kong, China
* Macao, China |
|Asia Pacific 2 |* The Philippines
* Indonesia
* Vietnam
* Taiwan, China |
|Asia Pacific 3 |South Korea and other Asia-Pacific countries and regions (excluding the Chinese Mainland) |
|North America |The United States, Mexico |
|Europe |The United Kingdom, the Netherlands, Germany, Italy, France, Russia, Spain |
|Middle East |Turkey |
|South America |Brazil |

skills / cyberkurry / seedream-volcengine

Creative, Research

\#image-generation \#web-search \#prompt

# Seedream Volcengine

CyberKurry / @cyberkurry

Generate or edit images with Volcengine Seedream (Doubao). Use for image creation requests incl. text-to-image, image-to-image, multi-reference fusion, sequential/group generation, PNG output, prompt optimization, web search, streaming. Supports Seedream 5.0-lite / 4.5 / 4.0.

Read more

### Install

CLI Prompt

$

```
openclaw skills install  @cyberkurry/seedream-volcengine
```

SKILL.md Stats & details

SKILL.md Skill Card Files Versions

# Seedream Image Generation

Generate and edit images via Volcengine Doubao-Seedream API using `{baseDir}/scripts/generate_image.py` .

This skill wraps the Volcengine Ark Image Generation API.
It supports text-to-image, image editing, multi-reference fusion, sequential/group generation, PNG output, prompt optimization, web search, and streaming output. Works with Seedream 5.0-lite (default), 4.5, and 4.0 models.

## Quick start

bash

```
# Text to image (simplest form)
uv run {baseDir}/scripts/generate_image.py --prompt "一只赛博朋克风格的猫"

# Image editing (with reference image)
uv run {baseDir}/scripts/generate_image.py --prompt "变为水墨画风格" --image "https://example.com/photo.jpg"

# Multi-reference fusion
uv run {baseDir}/scripts/generate_image.py --prompt "融合风格" --image "https://a.jpg" --image "https://b.jpg"

# Group/sequential generation
uv run {baseDir}/scripts/generate_image.py --prompt "四格漫画" --sequential --max-images 4

# List available models
uv run {baseDir}/scripts/generate_image.py --list-models
```

## API key

Set `VOLC_API_KEY` env var or pass `--api-key` . Never hardcode keys in scripts.

bash

```
export VOLC_API_KEY="your-key"
# or
--api-key your-key
```

## Models

Default model: `doubao-seedream-5-0-260128` (5.0-lite). Override with `--model` .

### Model comparison

|Feature |5\.0-lite |4\.5 |4\.0 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|Model ID |`doubao-seedream-5-0-260128` |`doubao-seedream-4-5-251128` |`doubao-seedream-4-0-250828` |
|Alias |`doubao-seedream-5-0-lite-260128` |— |— |
|Preset sizes |2K, 3K, 4K |2K, 4K |1K, 2K, 4K |
|Output formats |png, jpeg |jpeg only |jpeg only |
|Prompt optimization |standard |standard |standard, fast |
|Streaming |✅ |✅ |✅ |
|Web search |✅ (only model) |❌ |❌ |
|Rate limit |500 IPM |500 IPM |500 IPM |

### When to choose which model

* **5\.0-lite (default)** — Best overall quality. Only model supporting PNG output, 3K resolution, and web search. Use for most tasks.
* **4\.5** — High quality, slightly different style. Good alternative to 5.0-lite.
* **4\.0** — Supports `--prompt-optimization fast` for quicker results. Good for rapid iteration. Also supports 1K for smaller/faster generation.

...

If URL, remind user it expires in 24h if they need to save it

## Input image requirements

* **Formats** : jpeg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, gif, heic, heif
* **Max size** : 30MB per image
* **Max pixels** : 60,000,000 (width × height)
* **Aspect ratio** : [1/16, 16]
* **Min dimension** : > 14px per side
* **Max images** : 14 per request
* **Total** : input images + output images ≤ 15

## Rate limits

All models: 500 images per minute (IPM). Plan batch operations accordingly.

## Full reference

For detailed API parameter docs, see references/REFERENCE.md .

Read more
